title: High stakes battle in Hajipur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Hajipur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Hajipur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Hajipur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Hajipur triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Hajipur, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Hajipur assembly segment.
